user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch Cereal
fields.short_description: Sweet cinnamon-flavored square cereal served with milk — a quick, kid-friendly breakfast that appeals to picky eaters.
fields.meal_suggestion: Pour 1–1.5 cups of Cinnamon Toast Crunch into a bowl and add 3/4–1 cup of low-fat milk (or a dairy-free alternative). For more balance, top with sliced banana or a handful of berries and a sprinkle of chopped nuts for extra protein and fiber.
fields.nutrition_note: Primarily a carbohydrate-rich, quick breakfast — provides energy but is higher in sugar. Adding fruit and a source of protein (milk or nuts) increases fiber, vitamins, and satiety for a more balanced meal.

result.reasoning: Appended as an additional, quick kid-friendly breakfast option to Child Day 1 Breakfast; complements existing toast, smoothie, and yogurt choices.
